ab: inabayan! tratrima yu dra manay?
en: A: Hello, what are you looking for?

ab: tratrima ku dra saya dra takilr.
en: B: I want to buy a cup.

ab: inabayan! tratrima yu dra manay?
en: A: Hello, what are you looking for?

ab: tratrima ku dra saya dra kabung.
en: B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: tratrima ku dra takilr. menaniwan mu?
ch: A:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?

ab: ulraya! tratrima yu dra munuma?
en: B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?

ab: menaniwan mu dra puran?
en: A: Do you sell betel nut?

ab: uniyan! adri mi menaniwan dra puran.
en: B: No, we don't sell betel nut.

ab: tratrima ku dra beras.
en: A: I want to buy rice.

ab: tratrima yu dra munuma liputr?
en: B: How many packs do you want to buy?

ab: berayi ku dra teluwa liputr.
en: A: Give me three packs.

ab: tratrima ku dra bunga.
en: A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.

ab: muniwan lra peniya na bunga.
en: B: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.

ab: tratrima ku dra imar dra druwaya dalilran.
en: A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.

ab: musama lra a saya dalilran.
en: B: We only have one bottle left.

ab: uwa trimaan ku dra bitrenun.
en: A: Go buy me eggs.

ab: tratrima yu dra munuma tintin?
en: B: How many pounds do you want to buy?

ab: munuma tintin nu tratrimaan na bitrenun?
en: A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?

ab: tratrima ku dra druwaya tintin.
en: B: I want to buy two catties.

ab: tratrima ku dra druwaya tenges dra kenaw.
en: A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: musama lra a teluwa tenges kadri. berayanay kanu peniya a!
en: B: There are three left, all for you!

ab: idri na saliputr na beras i, munuma paisu?
en: A: How much is this bag of rice?

ab: druwaya leman paisu na saliputr.
en: B: $200 for a pack.

ab: mukasa i, makabetraan misama dra saya paisu. pukayane lra kana makabetraan paisu i.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.

ab: semangalan!
en: B: Thank you.

ab: makaiwa misama dra lruwatra paisu kadrini.
en: A: Here's $95.

ab: tremimaa ku driya dra saima. patelruaw dra saya leman paisu.
en: B: I'll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: lruwatra leman misama dra muketrep paisu peniya.
en: A:All $510.

ab: pukayane lra kana lruwatra leman paisu maw?
en: B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ab: padrangal lra dradru idrini. karuwa kemadulu dra saima driya?
ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It's too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: adri karuwa! madulu lra idrini a!
ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了!
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.

ab: aalak ku kandri na walru.
en: A: I want this packet of cookies.

ab: makatelun paisu idri na walru. ulraya driya a manay nu aalakan?
ch: B:這餅乾30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for the cookies, anything else you need?
